title: viola × durennei
intro: Viola × durennei, also known as the hybrid violet, is a type of flowering plant that is a cross between Viola riviniana and Viola odorata. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × durennei include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to calm digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
